parameters.name: generate_image
parameters.description: Generate an image from a text prompt using Google Nano Banana Pro (Gemini 3 Pro Image). Returns the image as a file. Parameters: prompt (text description, required), aspect_ratio (optional: 1:1, 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:4 — default 1:1)

value.prompt: ={{ $fromAI('prompt', 'Detailed text description of the image to generate', 'string') }}

parameters.name: edit_image
parameters.description: Edit a user-supplied image with a text prompt using Google Nano Banana Pro. Use this when the user sends a photo and asks for changes. Parameters: prompt (what to change, required), file_ref (file-bridge id of the source image — usually provided automatically when the user sends a photo, required), aspect_ratio (optional)

value.file_ref: ={{ $fromAI('file_ref', 'File-bridge id of the source image (from the user message)', 'string') }}

parameters.name: generate_video
parameters.description: Start video generation with Google Veo 3.1. Returns an operation_id IMMEDIATELY (does NOT wait for the video). After calling this, you MUST call wait_for_video repeatedly with the returned operation_id in this same conversation turn until it returns the finished MP4 file. Parameters: prompt (required), aspect_ratio (optional: 16:9 or 9:16, default 16:9), negative_prompt (optional), duration_seconds (optional, default 8)

value.prompt: ={{ $fromAI('prompt', 'Detailed text description of the video to generate', 'string') }}
value.negative_prompt: ={{ $fromAI('negative_prompt', 'Things to avoid in the video. Optional', 'string') }}

parameters.name: wait_for_video
parameters.description: Wait up to ~25 seconds for a Veo video to finish. Returns the finished MP4 file when ready, or a 'still generating, call again' message if not yet ready — in which case you MUST call this tool AGAIN with the SAME operation_id. Keep calling until you get the file. Typical Veo 3.1 jobs need 2-8 wait_for_video calls. Parameters: operation_id (the operation name returned by generate_video, required)
